title: gardenia florida var. grandiflora
intro: Gardenia florida var. grandiflora, also known as the large-flowered gardenia, is a tropical plant species that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. It is a popular ornamental plant valued for its fragrant, showy white flowers and glossy dark green leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Gardenia florida var. grandiflora include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system, and it can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture.
